column8: MSVC CRT stdio _fflush in orig (calls _flush + _commit on FILE._flag&0x4000); port links MinGW CRT — no port equivalent
MSVC CRT stdio _flush in orig (drains FILE._ptr-_base via _write, sets _flag|0x20 on error); port links MinGW CRT — no port equivalent
MSVC CRT _flushall in orig (walks DAT_004cfcec FILE table under _lock(2), per-stream _lock_stream/_fflush); port links MinGW CRT — no port equivalent
MSVC CRT _write in orig (validates fh via DAT_004cfbe0 ioinfo table, _lock_fh + _write_nolock + _errno=EBADF on bad fh); port links MinGW CRT — no port equivalent
MSVC CRT _write_nolock in orig (WriteFile with text-mode LF→CRLF expansion via 1028-byte local buf, _lseek_nolock on APPEND, _dosmaperr); port links MinGW CRT — no port equivalent
